_comment: FAIL — multiple allergen fields omitted. This is the Natasha's Law failure mode: the operator filled in the item but did not complete the allergen declaration block. OpenDQV fires 422 errors on every missing contains_* field before the record enters the system.
ingredients_text: Wheat tortilla, king prawns (crustacean), avocado, mayonnaise (eggs, rapeseed oil, mustard), mixed leaves, lemon juice.
_missing: contains_peanuts, contains_sesame, contains_soybeans, contains_sulphites, contains_tree_nuts are omitted — these 5 omissions each trigger a 422 error
